registers.name: pulse_output_quantity_per_pulse
registers.description: Quantity represented by one output pulse.

registers.name: mass_flow
registers.description: Live mass flow in the unit selected by mass_flow_unit.

registers.name: temperature
registers.description: Live temperature in the unit selected by temperature_unit.

registers.name: mass_acc
registers.description: Accumulated mass in the unit selected by mass_total_unit.

registers.name: low_threshold
registers.description: Low-flow cutoff threshold in the internal mass-flow unit.

registers.name: zero_offset
registers.description: Official zero offset used by the DSP flow calculation.

registers.name: modbus_byte_order
registers.description: Order used for every 32-bit Modbus value.

registers.name: modbus_apply
registers.description: Write 1 to apply validated communication settings after the response.

registers.name: volume_flow
registers.description: Live volume flow in the unit selected by volume_flow_unit.

registers.name: volume_acc
registers.description: Accumulated volume in the unit selected by volume_total_unit.

registers.name: density
registers.description: Live density in the unit selected by density_unit.

registers.name: signal_frequency_scale
registers.description: Signal-frequency scale used by density calculation.

registers.name: lpo_voltage
registers.description: Left pickup signal magnitude reported by the DSP.

registers.name: rpo_voltage
registers.description: Right pickup signal magnitude reported by the DSP.

registers.name: zero_monitor_status
registers.description: Zero-monitor readiness and validity bit field.

registers.name: zero_live_600ms
registers.description: Live trimmed zero value over the current 600 ms window.

registers.name: zero_window_valid_count
registers.description: Valid sample count in the current 600 ms window.

registers.name: pi_drive_gain
registers.description: Non-negative saturated raw PI drive gain reported at 500 Hz.

registers.name: zero_calibration_start
registers.description: Write true to start zero calibration; firmware clears it when complete.

registers.name: mass_total_reset
registers.description: Write true to clear accumulated mass; firmware clears it afterward.

registers.name: volume_total_reset
registers.description: Write true to clear accumulated volume; firmware clears it afterward.
